endpoints.name: Get All Company Codes
endpoints.description: Get All Company Codes for the selected company and resource
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PAYLOCITY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your PAYLOCITY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid. Replace {{CODERESOURCE}} with a real coderesource.

endpoints.name: Add new employee
endpoints.description: New Employee API sends new employee data directly to Web Pay. Companies who use the New Hire Template in Web Pay may require additional fields when hiring employees. New Employee API Requests will honor these required fields.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PAYLOCITY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your PAYLOCITY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid.

endpoints.name: Get all employees
endpoints.description: Get All Employees API will return employee data currently available in Web Pay.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PAYLOCITY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your PAYLOCITY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid.

endpoints.name: Get employee

endpoints.name: Get Company-Specific Open API Documentation
endpoints.description:
The company-specific Open API endpoint allows the client to GET an Open API document for the Paylocity API that is customized with company-specific resource schemas. These customized resource schemas define certain properties as enumerations of pre-defined values that correspond to the company's setup with Web Pay. The customized schemas also indicate which properties are required by the company within Web Pay.
To learn more about Open API, click [here](https://www.openapis.org/)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PAYLOCITY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your PAYLOCITY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid.

endpoints.name: Obtain new client secret.
endpoints.description: Obtain new client secret for Paylocity-issued client id. See Setup section for details.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PAYLOCITY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your PAYLOCITY ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Add new employee to Web Link
endpoints.description: Add new employee to Web Link will send partially completed or potentially erroneous new hire record to Web Link, where it can be corrected and competed by company administrator or authorized Paylocity Service Bureau employee.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PAYLOCITY_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your PAYLOCITY ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COMPANYID}} with a real companyid.
